items.name_en: 💖《Complete with original green box packaging》💖GG Marmont Card Holder. The brand's classic design details are reinterpreted every season, writing a new chapter for the brand's long design heritage. This card holder is crafted in black leather, featuring the classic double-G motif from the 1970s. Brown leather, gold-tone hardware, viscose lining, double-G logo, 6 card slots, 1 zip pocket.
items.name_cn:

Model: 597608.
Size: 12cm (W) x 8cm (H)
Color: Brown/pvc.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 💖《Complete with original green box packaging》💖GG Marmont Card Holder. This GG Marmont card holder is crafted in classic, durable black leather, adding a classic piece to the 《Aria- 》 collection. The double-G hardware reinterprets the 1970s belt buckle design in matching resin material. The combination of classic design and monochrome colorway highlights a modern fashion style.

items.name_cn:
Balenciaga Rodeo 🖤🖤
The popular Rodeo series has launched a new Nano chain bag ⛓️ Removable chain, instantly switch to a cute handbag ✌🏻 A must-have small bag for summer is here!!! Inner compartment with card slot, ultra-minimalist style 🔖 Who doesn't have their first summer cutie yet? ☺️
Model: 819429 Black/Gold
Dimensions: 16 x 9.9 x 4.5 cm

items.name_en: 🌹 BALENCIAGA*LE CITY The Tears of the Era
items.name_cn:
🌹 BALENCIAGA*LE CITY The Tears of the Era
The most iconic handbag, the Le City series, returns in 2024, reinterpreting the classic. Slightly different from the classic series, the mirror and cardholder are removed, and the strap design is more suitable for crossbody wear~ Small detail changes make the overall look lighter. The newly added macaron color series is especially suitable for spring and summer, creating a stylish collision of unruly cool looks and sweet colors, making fashion accessible.
Dimensions: 37 x 23.4 x 14.9 cm
Model: 823058 Silver nail

specs.rawTitle:
🌹 BALENCIAGA*LE CITY The Tears of the Era
The most iconic handbag, the Le City series, returns in 2024, reinterpreting the classic. Slightly different from the classic series, the mirror and cardholder are removed, and the strap design is more suitable for crossbody wear~ Small detail changes make the overall look lighter. The newly added macaron color series is especially suitable for spring and summer, creating a stylish collision of unruly cool looks and sweet colors, making fashion accessible.
Dimensions: 37 x 23.4 x 14.9 cm
Model: 823058 Silver nail

items.name_en: Small Tote from the latest Qixi Limited Edition series. Sweet Qixi, a unique romantic style, is so attractive to girls. The red body is embellished with small red flowers, super gentle and sweet, helping you capture moments of love. Exquisite embroidery paired with black cowhide, sweet yet elegant. The bag comes with an adjustable long shoulder strap, preserving the simple shape while offering the large capacity of a big bag. It can be carried by hand or worn diagonally, fully meeting daily travel needs.

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
🔥 New Puzzle Hobo is a soft and refined short Nappa leather shoulder bag 👜 Inspired by the Puzzle bag's rectangular shape and unique geometric lines, it starts with looks and stays true to the leather, especially the softness of the puzzle hobo which is stunning 🎀 The colors are super nice, stylish and versatile, cool yet sweet, really amazing, I love it 😻 Classic Nappa leather, soft and delicate to the touch~ The geometric design is really durable and can be carried for a long time 💚 Short shoulder strap, one external zip pocket and one interior pocket ✨ Leather zip pull, D-ring to connect personalized charms 🔗 Chevron cotton canvas with Anagram embossing 🛍️
Dimensions: 28CM~10CM~5.5CM
Style No.: 8018
Color: Moss Green

Authentic Grade
Summer Woven Zip Crossbody Bag A crossbody bag that doubles as a makeup bag, featuring exquisite weaving and a compact body. It is an essential accessory for the upcoming summer. The double zipper offers better protection, and the large capacity makes it a must-have. Style No.: 789109 Dimensions: 22*12.5*5cm
